## Meeting Purpose

Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy, and next steps.

## Key Takeaways

  - [Teero's organic traffic growth is ahead of typical pace, with \~200 daily sessions achieved earlier than usual](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Content with high engagement is practical, resourceful, and authoritative, with specific structural elements driving success](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Two key focus areas identified: AI-related content for Teero's second product, and emphasizing Teero's unique W2 employment model for hygienists](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Jacob Rudnik: Managing Director, former content lead at Softer and G2](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Rachel Pasche: Content Manager, previously at Men's Journal and Fortune](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Both joined GrowthX \~1 month ago to support strategy, execution, and content management](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

### Content Performance Update

  - [Slight increase in performance despite ongoing core update](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Early reports suggest more AI overviews in search results](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [High-engagement content analysis:](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
      - [Practical and resourceful topics (e.g., templates, top issues)](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
      - [Authoritative content (e.g., "what dental assistants are not allowed to do")](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
      - [Structural elements: direct intros, descriptive subheadings, numbering, strategic bold formatting](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### LLM Search Impact

  - [Following best SEO practices and ranking on page one crucial for LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Brand mentions, schema, and reviews may play a role in LLM rankings](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Core strategy remains focused on understanding user intent and creating valuable content](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Teero's Growth Progress

  - [Week 11 of content publishing shows exponential growth](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Ahead of typical pace, reaching \~200 daily sessions earlier than expected](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Growth can be lumpy; aim for significant inflection points quarterly](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [CTA and panel implementation for blogs in progress (assigned to Frank)](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [HubSpot CRM access to be granted to GrowthX team for lead tracking](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)

### Content Strategy Focus Areas

1.  AI-related content for Teero's upcoming second product
2.  Emphasizing Teero's unique W2 employment model for hygienists
      - [Largest employer of dental hygienists in the US by end of year](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
      - [Multiple angles: compliance, tax simplification, insurance benefits](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
      - [Competitor analysis needed for effective positioning](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

### Logistical Updates

  - [Aida out of office next Thursday and Friday](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
  - [Jacob to attend next week's meeting in Aida's place](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nate to review proposed insurance topics and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Nate to share W2 employment talking points, transcripts, and resources in a Google Doc](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [GrowthX team to brainstorm W2 employment content strategy and create a cluster of articles](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Frank to implement CTA/panel on blog posts (target: next week)](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Nate to grant HubSpot CRM access to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze competitors' W2 employment messaging and develop ranking strategy](https://fathom.video/share/1ZxvTBENN3ZsbpgXKSa8szbw7Vkchs2P?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
